title: Pan-Seared Cornish Chicken with Herby Pot Roast
description: A flavorful dish featuring pan-seared Cornish chicken paired with a herby pot roast, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Season the Cornish chicken breast with salt.
Heat 1 tbsp of rest oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer to the oven.
Roast the chicken in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken cooks, prepare the herby pot roast by mixing together 1 cup of icy water, 2 cups of meat broth, and 2 tbsp of rest oil.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Add the herby pot roast to the skillet and braise for 10-15 minutes, or until tender.
Serve the pan-seared Cornish chicken with the herby pot roast and garnish with a hot pepper, if desired.
